codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: App.tsx now threads readOnly from all three tracking hooks into LeadDrawer, StormWatchDrawer, and CaseDrawer; each drawer uses readOnly to disable interactive editing controls when browser writes are disabled.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The react-frontend skill requires opening each updated UI flow through normal app interactions, but this feature’s worker had to mount CaseDrawer directly because local case rows were unavailable. This fallback appears valid in practice and is not explicitly covered by the skill.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.deviations for session 4fea5dc4-5270-4011-a13e-8340c2d5b539 states CaseDrawer was mounted directly due to empty Cases view; .factory/skills/react-frontend/SKILL.md Work Procedure step 6 only describes standard navigation interactions.

summary: Reviewed feature fix-readonly-prop-threading using its handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and relevant architecture/skill docs. The code correctly threads readOnly through App.tsx and all three drawers honor disabled edit behavior, so this review passes with no blocking or non-blocking code defects.
